name: babel-cli
description: Local TypeScript/Node.js runtime harness for the Babel Multi-Agent OS

scripts.test:schema-failures: npm run test:schema-failures:unit && npm run test:schema-failures:replay
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:resolver && npm run test:pipeline-v9 && npm run test:mcp-adapter && npm run test:smoke-fixtures && npm run test:otel-tracing && npm run test:android-warning-cleanup && npm run test:bounded-contract && npm run test:orchestrator-routing
scripts.test:lite-gate: tsx --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning --test src/agent/**/*.test.ts src/cli/argv.test.ts src/cli/structuredOutput.test.ts src/commands/liteCommands.test.ts src/commands/userCommandSmoke.test.ts src/commands/workflowCommands.test.ts src/services/askAnswer.test.ts src/services/targetResolver.test.ts src/services/liteUsability.test.ts src/services/liteTrustDemo.test.ts src/services/liteRecovery.test.ts src/services/liteWorkerLoop.test.ts src/services/liteParallelReview.test.ts src/services/smallFix.test.ts src/services/checkpoints.test.ts src/services/ciReview.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: tsx --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning --test src/compiler.test.ts src/doctor.test.ts src/execute.reliabilityRepairProof.test.ts src/config/runtimeEnv.test.ts src/config/executionProfiles.test.ts src/config/benchmarkContainer.test.ts src/config/toolCapabilities.test.ts src/runtime/protocol.test.ts src/runtime/hooks.test.ts src/services/benchmarkRepair.test.ts src/services/benchmarkRepairLoop.test.ts src/services/costLedger.test.ts src/services/costTracker.test.ts src/services/modelPricingRegistry.test.ts src/services/repairGovernance.test.ts src/services/pipelineFailureArtifacts.test.ts src/services/proof.test.ts src/services/learning.test.ts src/services/terminalStatus.test.ts src/stages/benchmarkTaskRisk.test.ts src/stages/benchmarkVerification.test.ts src/stages/exactInvariants.test.ts src/stages/executorHelpers.test.ts src/stages/executorRepairState.test.ts
